headline: 2 Defensive Stocks That Wall Street Loves for the Oil Shock Playbook
summary: These two utility stocks combine defensiveness with strong growth outlooks.

headline: Ethics Streak Puts Xcel Energy’s Valuation And Risk Profile In Focus
summary: Xcel Energy has been recognized as one of the World's Most Ethical Companies for the seventh consecutive year. The 2026 honor from Ethisphere underscores ongoing focus on ethics, compliance, and corporate governance across the business. Xcel Energy, traded as NasdaqGS:XEL, sits in the regulated utility space where trust, reliability, and regulatory relationships are central. The company’s latest ethics recognition arrives with shares at $79.53 and a return of 18.7% over the past year and...
